title: ✨ Track Better, Share Better! 🚀
message: We've added fantastic new features to help you track your life seamlessly.
points: 📊 Enhanced Analytics: Dive deeper into your progress with our new lifetime and consistency charts.
🎉 Viral Sharing: Generate beautiful posters of your milestones and share them directly to Instagram!
🐞 Squashed Bugs: Under-the-hood performance improvements for a smoother experience.

title: 🎉 Welcome to All In One Tracker
message: The launch of your ultimate productivity and habit tracking companion.
